info.title: TikTok Business Account API
info.description:
The TikTok Business Account API enables management of organic content on TikTok Business Accounts. This API provides endpoints for managing business account profiles, organic videos, comments, content publishing, post authorization, benchmarks, and trending discovery.

Capabilities include:
- Account management - Retrieve business account profile and settings
- Video management - List and analyze organic video content and performance metrics
- Comment moderation - List, create, reply, delete, hide, like, and pin comments
- Content publishing - Publish videos and photos with hashtag suggestions and location tagging
- Post authorization - Manage third-party post authorization
- Analytics - Access benchmark and performance data
- Discovery - Search trending content and keywords

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Business account profile and information endpoints

tags.name: Videos
tags.description: Organic video listing and analytics endpoints

tags.name: Comments
tags.description: Comment management endpoints for listing, creating, replying, and moderating comments

tags.name: Publishing
tags.description: Content publishing endpoints for videos, photos, hashtags, and locations

tags.name: Post Authorization
tags.description: Post authorization management endpoints for third-party content authorization

tags.name: Discovery
tags.description: Trending content and keyword discovery endpoints

get.summary: Get authenticated user info from access token
get.description: Returns the business_id, scopes, and creator_id associated with the current access token. Use this to discover the business_id needed for other API calls.

business_id.description: The business account ID associated with this token.

creator_id.description: The creator ID associated with this token.

scopes.description: List of permission scopes granted to this token.

get.description: Retrieve profile information for a TikTok Business Account. Use the `fields` parameter to specify which fields to return. Basic fields include display_name and profile_image.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON array of fields to return. Basic fields: display_name, profile_image. All available fields: display_name, profile_image, followers_count, following_count, likes_count, video_count, bio_description, is_verified, username, profile_deep_link.

200.description: Successful response with business account data

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of organic videos for a TikTok Business Account. Use the `fields` parameter to specify which video data and metrics to return. Supports cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON array of video fields to return.

200.description: Successful response with paginated video list

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of comments on a specific video. Supports cursor-based pagination and field selection.

parameters.name: video_id
parameters.description: The ID of the video to retrieve comments for.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON array of comment fields to return.

parameters.name: sort_field
parameters.description: Field to sort comments by.

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order.

200.description: Successful response with paginated comment list

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of replies to a specific comment.

parameters.name: comment_id
parameters.description: The ID of the parent comment to retrieve replies for.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON array of reply fields to return.

200.description: Successful response with paginated reply list

post.summary: Create a comment on a video
post.description: Post a new top-level comment on a video owned by the business account.
Post a reply to an existing comment on a video owned by the business account.
Delete a comment or reply on a video owned by the business account.
Change the visibility of a comment on a video. Hidden comments are not visible to other users.
Like or unlike a comment on a video owned by the business account.
Pin or unpin a comment on a video owned by the business account. Pinned comments appear at the top of the comment list.
Publish a video to the TikTok Business Account. The video can be uploaded via a publicly accessible URL. The publish process is asynchronous; use the publish status endpoint to track progress.
Publish one or more photos to the TikTok Business Account. Photos can be uploaded via publicly accessible URLs.

get.description: Check the status of an asynchronous video or photo publish operation.

parameters.name: publish_id
parameters.description: The publish ID returned from a video or photo publish request.

get.description: Retrieve available video publishing settings and options for the business account, including privacy levels, interaction settings, and content disclosure options.
Retrieve available geographic locations that can be tagged when publishing content.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter locations.

get.description: Retrieve suggested hashtags based on a keyword. Useful when composing post captions.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: The keyword to get hashtag suggestions for.

post.description: Grant authorization for a third-party post on the business account. This enables collaborative content posting.

get.description: Check the current status of a post authorization request.

parameters.name: authorize_id
parameters.description: The authorization ID to check status for.

get.description: Retrieve the current post authorization settings for the business account.
Retrieve benchmark and performance comparison data for the business account. Benchmarks provide industry-level comparisons for key metrics.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON array of benchmark fields to return.

parameters.name: date_range
parameters.description: The time period for benchmark data.

get.description: Search for trending content and hashtags on TikTok. Results can be filtered by country and category.

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter trending content by region.

parameters.name: category_name
parameters.description: Category to filter trending content.

parameters.name: date_range
parameters.description: The time period for trending data.

get.description: Search for trending keywords on TikTok. Returns popular search terms and their associated metrics.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: The keyword to search for trending terms related to.

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter by region.

parameters.name: date_range
parameters.description: The time period for trending keyword data.

tiktok_oauth.description:
OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow for TikTok Business Accounts.

The authorization URL uses the TikTok account holder flow. The token and refresh endpoints use the Business API.

Non-standard behaviors (configure via MCP URL query params oauthClientIdParam, oauthCodeParam, oauthTokenFormat, oauthTokenHeader):
- Authorization request: uses `client_key` instead of `client_id`
- Token exchange: uses `auth_code` instead of `code`, JSON body instead of form-urlencoded
- Access token delivery: passed via the `Access-Token` header (not `Authorization: Bearer`)

Access tokens are valid for 24 hours; refresh tokens are valid for 1 year.

scopes.user.info.basic: Read basic profile info (display name, avatar, open ID)
scopes.user.info.username: Read the username of the TikTok account
scopes.user.info.profile: Read extended profile data (bio, verification status, profile links)
scopes.user.info.stats: Read statistical data (follower count, following count, video count, likes)
scopes.user.account.type: Read the account type of the TikTok account
scopes.user.insights: Access user engagement insights and analytics
scopes.video.list: Read user's public videos on TikTok
scopes.video.publish: Directly post content to a user's TikTok profile
scopes.video.upload: Share content as a draft for editing before posting
scopes.comment.list.manage: Create, delete, hide, like, and pin comments
scopes.tto.campaign.link: Link videos to TikTok One Creator Marketplace campaigns

BusinessId.name: business_id
BusinessId.description: The unique identifier of the TikTok Business Account.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Pagination cursor. Use the cursor value returned in the previous response to fetch the next page. The cursor is a UTC Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

MaxCount.name: max_count
MaxCount.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

BadRequest.description: Bad request - invalid parameters or malformed request body

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid, expired, or missing access token

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded - too many requests

BaseResponse.description: Standard TikTok Business API response envelope

request_id.description: Unique identifier for the request, useful for debugging.

data.description: Response data payload. Structure varies by endpoint.

ErrorResponse.description: Error response from the TikTok Business API

code.description: Error code. Non-zero values indicate an error.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for the failed request.

data.description: May be null or empty on error responses.

display_name.description: The display name of the business account.

profile_image.description: URL of the business account's profile image.

following_count.description: Total number of accounts being followed.

likes_count.description: Total number of likes received across all videos.

bio_description.description: The bio/description of the business account.

username.description: The unique username of the business account.

profile_deep_link.description: Deep link URL to the business account's TikTok profile.

Video.description: TikTok organic video object with metrics

create_time.description: UTC Unix timestamp when the video was created.

caption.description: The video caption text, including hashtags and mentions.

video_duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds.

full_video_watched_rate.description: Percentage of viewers who watched the entire video.

total_time_watched.description: Total cumulative watch time in seconds.

impression_sources.description: Breakdown of where video impressions came from.

audience_countries.description: Breakdown of viewer countries as percentages.

thumbnail_url.description: URL of the video thumbnail image.

cursor.description: Cursor for the next page. Pass this value to fetch subsequent pages.

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available.

create_time.description: UTC Unix timestamp when the comment was created.

likes.description: Number of likes on the comment.

replies.description: Number of replies to the comment.

user_id.description: ID of the user who posted the comment.

user_avatar_url.description: Avatar URL of the comment author.

parent_comment_id.description: ID of the parent comment, if this is a reply.

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available.

CommentCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a new comment on a video

video_id.description: The ID of the video to comment on.

CommentReplyCreateRequest.description: Request body for replying to an existing comment

video_id.description: The ID of the video the comment belongs to.

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to reply to.

CommentDeleteRequest.description: Request body for deleting a comment

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to delete.

CommentHideRequest.description: Request body for hiding or unhiding a comment

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to hide or unhide.

hidden.description: Set to true to hide the comment, false to unhide.

CommentLikeRequest.description: Request body for liking or unliking a comment

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to like or unlike.

CommentPinRequest.description: Request body for pinning or unpinning a comment

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to pin or unpin.

pinned.description: Set to true to pin the comment, false to unpin.

CommentActionResult.description: Result of a comment creation or reply action

comment_id.description: The ID of the newly created comment or reply.

create_time.description: UTC Unix timestamp when the comment was created.

text.description: The text content of the created comment.

VideoPublishRequest.description: Request body for publishing a video to the business account

video_url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the video to publish.

PhotoPublishRequest.description: Request body for publishing photos to the business account

photo_images.description: Array of publicly accessible photo URLs. Maximum 35 images.

photo_cover_index.description: Index (0-based) of the photo to use as the cover image.

PostInfo.description: Post metadata and settings for published content

title.description: Post title. Maximum 90 characters for photo posts.

description.description: Post description/caption with hashtags and mentions. Maximum 2200 characters for videos, 4000 for photos.

privacy_level.description: Privacy level for the published content.

disable_comment.description: If true, comments will be disabled on the post.

disable_duet.description: If true, duets will be disabled on the post (videos only).

disable_stitch.description: If true, stitches will be disabled on the post (videos only).

brand_content_toggle.description: Set to true if the content is a paid partnership to promote a third-party business.

brand_organic_toggle.description: Set to true if the content is promoting the creator's own business.

is_aigc.description: Set to true if the content is AI-generated.

location_id.description: Location ID to tag on the post. Use the publish/location endpoint to search for valid IDs.

PublishResult.description: Result of a content publish initiation

publish_id.description: Unique identifier to track the publish action. Use with the publish/status endpoint to check progress.

PublishStatusData.description: Status of a content publish operation

status.description: Current status of the publish operation.

fail_reason.description: Reason for failure, if status is FAILED.

item_id.description: The video/post ID once published successfully.

VideoSettingsData.description: Video publishing settings and available options

privacy_level_options.description: Available privacy level options for the account.

comment_disabled.description: Whether comments are disabled at the account level.

duet_disabled.description: Whether duets are disabled at the account level.

stitch_disabled.description: Whether stitches are disabled at the account level.

max_video_duration.description: Maximum allowed video duration in seconds.

Location.description: A geographic location for content tagging

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available.

video_count.description: Number of videos using this hashtag.

view_count.description: Total views across videos using this hashtag.

PostAuthorizeRequest.description: Request body for authorizing a third-party post

authorized_user_id.description: The user ID to grant authorization to.

PostAuthorizeResult.description: Result of a post authorization request

PostAuthorizeDeleteRequest.description: Request body for deleting a post authorization

post_id.description: The post ID associated with this authorization.

authorized_user_id.description: The user ID that was granted authorization.

create_time.description: UTC Unix timestamp when the authorization was created.

expire_time.description: UTC Unix timestamp when the authorization expires.

PostAuthorizeSettingData.description: Post authorization settings for the business account

authorization_enabled.description: Whether post authorization is enabled for the account.

default_permissions.description: Default permissions granted to authorized users.

max_authorized_users.description: Maximum number of users that can be authorized.

authorization_expiry_days.description: Number of days before an authorization expires.

BenchmarkData.description: Benchmark and performance data for the business account

followers_count.description: Net new followers in the period.

likes_count.description: Total likes received in the period.

comments_count.description: Total comments received in the period.

video_views.description: Total video views in the period.

profile_views.description: Total profile views in the period.

engagement_rate.description: Overall engagement rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.05 for 5%).

date_range.description: The time period for the benchmark data.

TrendingItem.description: A trending hashtag or content item

hashtag_id.description: Unique identifier for the trending hashtag.

rank_position.description: Current rank position in trending list.

rank_change.description: Change in rank position (positive = moved up).

views.description: Total views in the selected period.

posts.description: Number of posts using this hashtag in the period.

top_country_list.description: Top countries where this hashtag is trending.

country_code.description: The country code used for filtering.

date_range.description: The date range used for filtering.

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available.

search_volume.description: Search volume for the keyword in the period.

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available.
